zt.answer: The recorded maximum is SnSe at about 2.6 (curve 1-2-3 / paper 456). A few extreme values >3.5 exist but were excluded as likely axis-label errors.
zt.note: Physically impossible ZT (>3.5) was excluded as a likely data error

composition.answer: Three SnSe-family samples were found. A representative one is sample 1-2 (SnSe, paper 456). All come with thermoelectric measurements (Seebeck / ZT).

schema.answer: The new design has two entries of the kind Widget, each with a name (alpha, beta). No typed tool matched, so the design was introspected to generate and run the SPARQL below.

fallback.answer: No grounded-answer demo fixture is registered for this question. Try the ZT ranking or composition search examples.
